text:
Mrs. Humburgang is a minor character that is exclusive to the manga bonus chapter The Blind Alchemist and its OVA adaptation in the 2009 anime. She is a red-haired, soft-voiced, fancily dress woman.

Role in the Anime

Mrs. Humburgang has a very minor role in the anime, in the episode she appears in, she is the one who informs Edward about the Human Transumation Jude performed with Rosalie. She later explains what happened to the original Rosalie during the Transmutation Jude performed after Edward finds out about the truth of Rosalie.

Trivia

Her English Dub Actress, Jennifer Seman, also plays Ikaruga in Fairy Tail in the English Dub.
